channel.title: Travel Baby Travel Baby Blog
channel.description: Travel tips, destination guides, and deal alerts to help you travel smarter.

item.title: Building a Design System from Scratch
item.description: Learn how to create a scalable design system with tokens, components, and documentation that keeps your team aligned.

item.title: SEO Best Practices for Modern Websites
item.description: A practical guide to technical SEO, content structure, and performance optimizations that actually move the needle.

item.title: Getting Started with Astro: A Practical Guide
item.description: Everything you need to know to build your first Astro site, from project setup to deployment.

item.title: Responsive Layouts Without the Headaches
item.description: Modern CSS techniques for building layouts that look great on every screen size.

item.title: CMS Integration Tips for Static Sites
item.description: How to connect a headless CMS to your static site generator for the best of both worlds.

item.title: The Web Performance Checklist
item.description: A step-by-step checklist to audit and improve your site speed, Core Web Vitals, and user experience.
